description: A PUSH whose absolute STALE_AT has already passed MUST be silently discarded; no NUDGE MUST be sent even when REQUIRES_ACK is set
normative_ref: spec/04-semantic-expiry.md § Expiry Types (00 — Absolute Timestamp); Receiver Behaviour

steps.comment: STALE_AT type=00, value=0 (Unix epoch). now_ms >= 0 is always true, so the packet is always stale.
Discarding MUST be silent — no ERROR, no NUDGE (spec §Receiver Behaviour).
